item.description:
What's new in 0.1.18

  • Much lighter on CPU and battery - the notch widget, the main window, and the ambient screensaver now stay near-idle instead of redrawing every frame.
  • The notch eyes blink properly again, and animated notch styles (Eye, Eyes, Live, Ticker) gain an Animated toggle to hold them perfectly still.
  • The screensaver is far lighter, especially across multiple displays.
  • AwakeMate now checks for updates every 6 hours, and the menu shows an "Update available" badge when a new version is ready.
